name: IN$DEX
description: The world's first Sovereign Digital Civilization. IN$DEX is a permissionless, mobile-first sovereign finance layer built for the 1.54 billion people the legacy banking system left behind. Send money across Pacific corridors in 90 seconds. No bank account. No permission required. INDX is the native token of the IN$DEX Sovereign Civilisation — powering remittances, creator economies, governance, and the Citizen Assembly. 100 million total supply. Genesis price $0.24. Grand Synchronicity: September 24, 2026.
